class.name: PolygonWire
class.description: [PolygonWire] builds a wire from 2D points on an optional [CadPlane]. It is a sketch convenience wrapper over [method Wire.build_polygon], lifting plane-space points into 3D automatically.

method.name: build_polygon_2d
method.description: Builds a polygon from [param points] on [param plane]. If [param plane] is omitted, the global XY plane is used. When [param closed] is [code]true[/code], the final point is connected back to the first.
